🧹 Skills Hygiene

Three related src/skills cleanups bundled: AskUserQuestion preview strip, current-default model bump to 4.8, and stale doctor counts.

1 · AskUserQuestion preview strip (nav-bug workaround)

On current CC, a preview field forces a side-by-side picker layout where ↑/↓ navigation is dead (confirmed 2026-05-28). Removed 92 keys across 19 files — label + description kept.


  
Schema RULES unchanged — preview is still permitted (option keys ⊆ {label, description, preview}); it's just no longer authored. Schema test stays green: 63 calls / 69 questions conform.


  
2 · Current-default model → claude-opus-4-8

  

    
spotchange

    
multimodal-llm: high-accuracy-vision row + code sample4-7 → 4-8

    
multimodal-llm/rules/vision-image-analysis (2×)4-7 → 4-8

    
rag-retrieval/rules/multimodal-pipeline default arg4-7 → 4-8

  

  
Kept 4-7 (a real model, not drift): model-availability lists, version-compat changelog, "bug observed under 4.7" notes, anthropic.com news URLs, and all hook pricing/version maps.


  
3 · Doctor counts refresh

  

    
fileold → new

    
doctor/references/skills-validation.md103 → 111 skills

    
doctor/references/health-check-outputs.md103→111 skills, 36→37 agents

  


  
PR chore/askuserq-preview-strip · root-cause fix in src/ (+ regenerated reference docs) · playground
